name: count-up
title: Count Up
description: A token-native stat counter that eases between values and lands with a restrained scale pulse.
evidence: Wave I I4 approved spec with the apple-money-count interpolation mechanic extracted and de-styled

variables.label: Start value
variables.description: First value shown by the count.

variables.label: End value
variables.description: Final value where the count lands.

variables.label: Prefix
variables.description: Optional text shown before the value.

variables.label: Suffix
variables.description: Optional text shown after the value.

variables.label: Glow
variables.description: Optional soft accent glow under the count. Off by default.

variables.label: Exit
variables.description: Optional departure. Default none: the landed value holds until the frame cuts.
